title: Front Office Manager - Taj SATS - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Taj SATS - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Taj SATS are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Taj SATS:
Taj SATS is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj SATS!
